title: First Draft
description: Complete your first draft.

title: Swiss Merchant
description: Go 3-0 in the Swiss stage.

title: Game 7 Ice
description: Win a playoff series 4-3.

title: Comeback Kings
description: Win a series after being two games down.

title: Dynasty Builder
description: Draft all three players from the same historical lineup.

title: On the Podium
description: Finish a run in the top three.

title: The Long Way
description: Win the title after dropping into the lower bracket.

title: Strangers
description: Win the title with Poor chemistry.

title: Old School
description: Win the title with all three player cards from 2019 or earlier.

title: One Country Army
description: Win a tournament with all three players from the same country.

title: Against the Odds
description: Beat a team rated 8 or more above yours.

title: No Numbers Needed
description: Win a tournament with overalls hidden.

title: Hard Mode Hero
description: Win a tournament on Hard.

title: Legacy Unlocked
description: Unlock Legacy difficulty by winning on Hard.

title: Immortal Gauntlet
description: Win a tournament on Legacy.

title: Perfect Chemistry
description: Finish a run with Perfect chemistry.

title: Collector
description: Unlock your first special card.

title: Archive Hunter
description: Unlock 5 special cards.

title: Curator
description: Unlock 10 special cards.

title: Immaculate
description: Win the tournament without dropping a single series.

title: Untouchable
description: Complete a run without conceding a single goal.

title: Regional Royalty
description: Win a region-locked run.

title: The Creator's Card
description: Discover and unlock the hidden Rocket Draft Creator card.
